load-to-google-cloud.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

PROJECT="${GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT:-<gcp-project>}"
LOCATION="${GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION:-US}"
DATASET="${BQ_DATASET:-ge_mock_asc_606_contract_analyzer}"
BUCKET="${GCS_BUCKET:--gcp-project--factory-asc_606_contract_analyzer}"
PREFIX="${GCS_PREFIX:-factory/asc_606_contract_analyzer}"

if [ "${GE_SKIP_SERVICE_ENABLE:-0}" != "1" ]; then
  gcloud services enable storage.googleapis.com bigquery.googleapis.com --project "${PROJECT}"
else
  echo "Skipping API enablement; factory provision owns required APIs."
fi
if [ "${GE_SKIP_BUCKET_CREATE:-0}" = "1" ]; then
  echo "Skipping bucket creation/check; factory provision owns gs://${BUCKET}."
elif ! gcloud storage buckets describe "gs://${BUCKET}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  gcloud storage buckets create "gs://${BUCKET}" --project "${PROJECT}" --location "${LOCATION}"
fi
bq --location="${LOCATION}" mk --dataset --description "GE mock data for asc_606_contract_analyzer" "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

gcloud storage cp mock_data/cloud/bigquery/ndjson/*.jsonl "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/"
if [ -d fixtures/documents ]; then gcloud storage cp --recursive fixtures/documents "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/documents"; fi

# Publish this agent's MCP tool manifest to the shared agent-data bucket so the
# per-department MCP service can resolve it at runtime via ?agent=<id>. The worker
# sets GE_AGENT_DATA_BUCKET + GE_AGENT_ID; skipped (degrades) when unset (local runs).
if [ -n "${GE_AGENT_DATA_BUCKET:-}" ] && [ -n "${GE_AGENT_ID:-}" ] && [ -f mock_data/cloud/mcp-tools.json ]; then
  gcloud storage cp mock_data/cloud/mcp-tools.json "gs://${GE_AGENT_DATA_BUCKET}/agents/${GE_AGENT_ID}/mcp-tools.json"
  echo "Published MCP tool manifest → gs://${GE_AGENT_DATA_BUCKET}/agents/${GE_AGENT_ID}/mcp-tools.json"
else
  echo "Skipping MCP tool manifest publish (needs GE_AGENT_DATA_BUCKET + GE_AGENT_ID + mock_data/cloud/mcp-tools.json)"
fi

bq load --location="${LOCATION}" --replace --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}.sales_orders" "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/sales_orders.jsonl" "mock_data/cloud/bigquery/schemas/sales_orders.schema.json"
bq load --location="${LOCATION}" --replace --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}.contracts" "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/contracts.jsonl" "mock_data/cloud/bigquery/schemas/contracts.schema.json"
bq load --location="${LOCATION}" --replace --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}.billing_documents" "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/billing_documents.jsonl" "mock_data/cloud/bigquery/schemas/billing_documents.schema.json"
bq load --location="${LOCATION}" --replace --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}.contract_repository_records" "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/contract_repository_records.jsonl" "mock_data/cloud/bigquery/schemas/contract_repository_records.schema.json"
bq load --location="${LOCATION}" --replace --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}.contract_repository_events" "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/contract_repository_events.jsonl" "mock_data/cloud/bigquery/schemas/contract_repository_events.schema.json"
bq load --location="${LOCATION}" --replace --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}.contract_repository_audit_trail" "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/contract_repository_audit_trail.jsonl" "mock_data/cloud/bigquery/schemas/contract_repository_audit_trail.schema.json"
bq load --location="${LOCATION}" --replace --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}.analytics_events" "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/analytics_events.jsonl" "mock_data/cloud/bigquery/schemas/analytics_events.schema.json"
bq load --location="${LOCATION}" --replace --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}.historical_metrics" "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/historical_metrics.jsonl" "mock_data/cloud/bigquery/schemas/historical_metrics.schema.json"
bq load --location="${LOCATION}" --replace --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}.cached_aggregates" "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/cached_aggregates.jsonl" "mock_data/cloud/bigquery/schemas/cached_aggregates.schema.json"
bq load --location="${LOCATION}" --replace --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON "${PROJECT}:${DATASET}.documents_manifest" "gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}/tables/documents_manifest.jsonl" "mock_data/cloud/bigquery/schemas/documents_manifest.schema.json"

echo "Loaded GE mock data to BigQuery dataset ${PROJECT}:${DATASET} and Cloud Storage gs://${BUCKET}/${PREFIX}"
